description: Import reference survey data from /home/ga/Documents/giza_reference_points.csv (map 'latitude', 'longitude', and 'name' columns). Create a folder 'Giza Plateau Survey 2025' with subfolders 'Pyramid Complex' and 'Supporting Structures'. Navigate to the Giza Plateau (~29.976°N, 31.131°E). In 'Pyramid Complex', create placemarks: 'Great Pyramid of Khufu' (29.9792°N, 31.1342°E, description: 'Base length: 230m, Original height: 146.6m, Built circa 2560 BCE'), 'Pyramid of Khafre' (29.9761°N, 31.1308°E, description: 'Base length: 215m, Retains limestone casing at apex'), 'Pyramid of Menkaure' (29.9725°N, 31.1281°E, description: 'Base length: 108m, Smallest of the three main pyramids'). Measure the straight-line distances between consecutive pyramids using the Ruler tool. In 'Supporting Structures', create placemarks 'Great Sphinx' (29.9753°N, 31.1376°E, description: 'Length: 73m, Height: 20m, Carved from limestone bedrock') and 'Valley Temple of Khafre' (29.9741°N, 31.1378°E, description: 'Granite-clad mortuary temple, connected to pyramid by causeway'). Create a path 'Khafre Causeway' from the Valley Temple to the Pyramid of Khafre following the visible causeway remains with at least 5 waypoints. Set terrain exaggeration to 2.0x (Tools > Options > 3D View) and tilt to a 3D perspective from the southeast. Export the 'Giza Plateau Survey 2025' folder as KML to /home/ga/Documents/giza_plateau_survey.kml. Save a 3D perspective screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/giza_overview.png.
